'''鈭歞h-zh-w-th''' ('''kadhazhwethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rifle|rifle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rifle|rifle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-zh-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazhwethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhazhwethoko|thidhazhwethoko]] || [[word:jidhazhwethoko|jidhazhwethoko]] || [[word:shidhazhwethoko|shidhazhwethoko]] || [[word:kidhazhwethoko|kidhazhwethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
